backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the portfolio backend, managing artworks, user profiles, site images (logo, cover, portrait), and text content with admin/user access control via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Instagram/WhatsApp links, admin panel trigger, admin login, QR code section) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, cards, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio app, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component setting up TanStack Router with three routes (`/`, `/admin-login`, `/admin`) and wrapping the app in a React Query provider; the portfolio page includes a QRSection between ArtworkGallery and ContactSection.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Static about section displaying the artist portrait image, bio text, decorative corner accents, a floating experience badge, and a stats row with years, projects, and satisfaction metrics.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkGallery.t: Displays a responsive grid gallery of artworks fetched via a query hook, with skeleton loading states and a lightbox dialog for viewing individual artwork details.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Renders a contact section with location, WhatsApp, and Instagram info cards alongside a CTA card linking to WhatsApp for project inquiries.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Renders a 'Featured Projects' section by mapping a static list of five mural projects to alternating-layout ProjectSection components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, and a hidden double-click easter egg on the logo that navigates to the admin login page.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a dynamic cover image and text content fetched from query hooks, featuring WhatsApp CTA and portfolio scroll buttons.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-spy active section highlighting, mobile menu toggle, WhatsApp CTA, and a double-click logo shortcut to the admin login route.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Renders a single project entry with a large image (70%) and a text panel (30%), supporting alternating layout via a `reverse` prop and displaying a numbered overlay badge.
frontend/src/components/QRSection.tsx: Displays a section with a dynamically generated QR code linking to the @khudrangkalakaar Instagram profile, along with a direct clickable link.
Renders a grid of seven service offerings (e.g., murals, 3D illusions) each with an icon, title, and description in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Displays a 'Why Clients Trust Us' section with six trust-point cards featuring numbered accents, checkmark icons, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) modes, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an `InternetIdentityProvider` context and `useInternetIdentity` hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including logo, cover image, artist portrait, text content, and artworks via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view based on scroll position, returning the active section ID.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Poppins font and Tailwind directives, defining CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, terracotta tokens, radius) and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that validates hardcoded credentials (username/password), triggers Internet Identity authentication, assigns an admin role via the backend actor, and redirects to the admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing gallery artworks, site images (logo, cover, portrait), and text content; guards access by checking authentication and admin role, redirecting unauthorized users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (including hash-based routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Poppins), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins enabled.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Khudrang Kalakaar art portfolio app's architecture, existing features (social links, QR code, admin panel), known issues, and a pending feature request for client-side image upload to gallery.
